description_long: This is a tall, rectangular cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, light-colored body and two prominent vertical doors on one side. The front doors are finished in a medium wood tone, divided by a subtle vertical seam, and lack visible handles, giving it a sleek, modern appearance. The sides and top of the cabinet are a lighter, almost off-white color, contrasting with the wood-toned front. The back of the cabinet is plain and matches the light color of the sides, while the front is the only side with visible functional elements. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood or engineered wood, with a likely hollow interior for storage. Its clean lines and neutral palette make it suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A tall, rectangular cabinet with wood-toned double doors and a light-colored body, featuring a modern, handleless design. The front is visually distinct with its vertical seam and contrasting wood finish.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the cabinet's slim profile and light-colored surface.
description_view_1: The front view displays two vertical wood-toned doors with a central seam, highlighting the main access point.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, showing the same slim, light-colored profile.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a plain, light-colored surface with no visible features or openings.
